_comment: Shared, language-neutral query corpus for the multi-client conformance suite. Each runner executes the SAME `sql` and compares the result against `expected` using its own (per-language) comparison code. Canonical value encoding: INT64/FLOAT64 -> JSON number, STRING -> string, BOOL -> bool, NULL -> null, DATE -> 'YYYY-MM-DD', TIMESTAMP -> 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ' (UTC), ARRAY -> JSON array, STRUCT -> JSON object.

cases.name: scalar_types
cases.sql: SELECT 42 AS int_col, 3.5 AS float_col, 'hello' AS str_col, true AS bool_col

cases.name: null_value
cases.sql: SELECT CAST(NULL AS INT64) AS n

cases.name: struct
cases.sql: SELECT STRUCT(1 AS a, 'x' AS b) AS s

cases.name: multi_row
cases.sql: SELECT n FROM UNNEST([10, 20, 30]) AS n ORDER BY n

cases.name: aggregate
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(n) AS total FROM UNNEST([1, 2, 3, 4]) AS n
